assertions.title: First-visit journey end-to-end

steps.expected: Landing page loads with hero and CTA
steps.observed: Landing page loaded successfully with hero content and 'Get Started' CTA

steps.action: Fill signup form with email and password
steps.observed: Email and password fields filled successfully
Account created, redirected to /dashboard with authenticated state
Successfully navigated to /plan/new with welcome message displayed

steps.expected: AI generates plan and plan appears on dashboard
steps.observed: OpenRouter rate limit error: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' - plan generation failed

steps.expected: Newly created plan appears in dashboard
steps.observed: Dashboard still shows 'Create Your First Plan' - plan was not saved (auto-save not working)

evidence.network: POST to OpenRouter API returned rate limit error

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: Plan generation failed due to OpenRouter rate limit (20 req/min). Plan auto-save is NOT WORKING as confirmed - no plan persisted to dashboard even after attempt.

assertions.title: Data persistence across sessions

steps.expected: Session terminated, redirected to landing page

steps.action: Sign back in with same credentials
steps.expected: User re-authenticated, dashboard shows previously created plans
steps.observed: Successfully signed back in, but dashboard shows 'Create Your First Plan' - no plans exist

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: No plan data to persist because plan generation was blocked by OpenRouter rate limit. Additionally, plan auto-save feature is confirmed NOT WORKING.

assertions.title: Multiple plans management

steps.expected: First plan created and listed on dashboard
steps.observed: Plan generation failed due to OpenRouter rate limit

steps.expected: Second plan created, both plans listed on dashboard
steps.observed: Cannot create multiple plans when plan generation is blocked

steps.action: Verify each plan has correct data
steps.expected: Both plans independently accessible with correct data

assertions.issues: BLOCKED: Cannot test multiple plans management when plan creation is blocked by OpenRouter rate limit and auto-save is not working.

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min) prevents AI plan generation testing - this is a known infrastructure limitation
Plan auto-save feature is NOT WORKING - plans generated via chat do not persist to database. Dashboard shows 'Create Your First Plan' even after AI generates plan.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) - plan generation attempts return 'Rate limited, try again in a moment'
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 20 seconds after submission, still rate limited. This is a hard limit on free tier.

blockers.description: Plan auto-save is NOT WORKING - fix-plan-auto-save feature pending. Confirmed: plans do not persist to database even if AI generation succeeds.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified dashboard state after plan attempt - no plans saved. Known issue per validation-state.json.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked. All cross-area flow assertions are blocked by two issues: (1) OpenRouter rate limit preventing plan generation, and (2) Plan auto-save not working. These are known blockers from prior validation work. The first-visit journey through authentication works correctly, but plan creation and persistence fails.
